_note: Cycle 5 dedicated cycle: arch-7 phase 2 score CAS architecture (R9). Replace direct score writes with append-only JSONL to logs/lifecycle.jsonl. Reads use latest entry; writes use optional CAS on prev_score (--expected-prev-score param). 9 mandatory schema fields: ts, agent, event, prev_score, new_score, delta, unclamped_score, actor, reason.

acceptance_criteria.given: logs/lifecycle.jsonl exists (empty or with existing entries) AND lifecycle-baseline-import.sh has been run
acceptance_criteria.when: bash scripts/score-update.sh --agent dev --event close_success_qa_pass --note test is invoked
acceptance_criteria.then: logs/lifecycle.jsonl has exactly one more line than before; new line parses as valid JSON; new entry contains all 9 mandatory fields: agent=dev, event=close_success_qa_pass, delta=2, unclamped_score=prev_score+2, new_score=max(0,min(100,unclamped_score)) clamped, reason=test, prev_score equals prior latest score for dev, ts is valid ISO-8601, actor is non-empty. No field named note or uncapped_delta appears in emitted JSON.

acceptance_criteria.given: logs/lifecycle.jsonl has one entry for agent dev with new_score=50
acceptance_criteria.when: bash scripts/score-update.sh --agent dev --event close_success_qa_pass --expected-prev-score 99 is invoked (wrong expected score)
acceptance_criteria.then: exit code is 3, logs/lifecycle.jsonl has same number of lines as before, no new entry appended

acceptance_criteria.given: logs/lifecycle.jsonl contains a baseline entry for ba with new_score=70 AND agent-scores.json contains a different score (e.g. 40) for ba
acceptance_criteria.then: stdout contains [Range: 61-80] (Senior Craftsman range for score 70), not the range for score 40

acceptance_criteria.given: logs/lifecycle.jsonl has only a score_baseline_import entry for dev (no score_update entries yet)
acceptance_criteria.then: stdout contains Recent events: none (baseline import is not a behavioral event)

acceptance_criteria.given: logs/lifecycle.jsonl is empty (or has partial imports)
acceptance_criteria.when: bash scripts/lifecycle-baseline-import.sh is invoked twice consecutively
acceptance_criteria.then: second invocation appends zero lines (all agents already have a lifecycle entry after first run)

acceptance_criteria.given: tests/generated/20260522-000000/test_AC4_7d4395a2a5e37239.py has been updated (M8) AND the test seeds the temporary lifecycle JSONL with ba latest new_score=100 before invoking score-update.sh
acceptance_criteria.then: exit code 0 (PASS); the test asserts unclamped_score == 101 and delta == 1

acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/doc_sync/tree.py and hooks/doc_sync/regen_readme.py have been updated (M4)
acceptance_criteria.when: the SKIP_FILES / SKIP_NAMES sets in both files are inspected
acceptance_criteria.then: lifecycle.jsonl and lifecycle.jsonl.lock are present as exact string members in both sets

acceptance_criteria.given: logs/lifecycle.jsonl is empty (zero bytes, as currently committed)
acceptance_criteria.then: logs/lifecycle.jsonl contains exactly 21 lines (one per canonical agent), each line parses as valid JSON with event=score_baseline_import and agent matching a canonical agent name

acceptance_criteria.given: the repo is in its current state (lifecycle.jsonl empty but tracked via .gitignore exception)
acceptance_criteria.then: exit code 0 (file IS tracked; --error-unmatch ensures exit 1 if path not in index)

acceptance_criteria.given: logs/lifecycle.jsonl contains a valid JSONL preamble (at least one valid JSON line for agent dev) followed by a malformed (non-JSON) line that is NOT the final partial line
acceptance_criteria.then: exit code is 1, stderr is non-empty, stdout does NOT contain INJECTION_PROOF
